name: pelorus-nav
description: Pelorus Nav — open-source web-based marine chartplotter

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && rm -f dist/*.pmtiles dist/*.coverage.geojson dist/*.search.json && ([ "$CAPACITOR" = "1" ] || bun run docs:build)
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.sprites:catalog: uv run --with reportlab --with svglib python tools/sprites/render-sprite-catalog.py
scripts.cap:sync: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && bunx cap run android
scripts.cap:build: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleRelease
scripts.cap:build:aab: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean bundleRelease
scripts.cap:build:debug: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleDebug
scripts.cap:sync:ios: bun run ios:version && CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:run:ios: bun run ios:version && CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync ios && bunx cap run ios
scripts.cap:build:ios: bun run ios:version && CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -project App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath build/App.xcarchive archive
